subtitle.en: Store, resize, optimize and deliver images at the edge
subtitle.zh: 在邊緣節點儲存、縮放、最佳化並傳送圖片

tagline.en: One image in, every size and format out — automatically optimized for each visitor.
tagline.zh: 上傳一張原圖，自動產生各種尺寸與格式，為每位訪客送出最合適的版本。

text.en: Cloudflare Images is a service that stores your images and serves the perfect version of each one to every visitor — the right size, the right format, and the smallest possible file — all done automatically at Cloudflare's edge.
text.zh: Cloudflare Images 是一個幫你「存放圖片」並「即時最佳化」的服務。它會在 Cloudflare 的邊緣節點，自動為每位訪客送出最適合的圖片版本：合適的尺寸、合適的格式、最小的檔案大小，全程不用你手動處理。

text.en: Edge means Cloudflare's servers spread across hundreds of cities worldwide. When someone opens your page, the image is processed and sent from a server physically close to them, so it arrives fast.
text.zh: 「邊緣（edge）」指的是 Cloudflare 散布在全球數百個城市的伺服器。當有人打開你的網頁時，圖片會由離他最近的伺服器處理並送出，所以載入很快。

title.en: Think of it like a tailor

text.en: You hand over one outfit (the original image). The tailor instantly resizes and re-cuts it to fit whoever walks in — phone, laptop, or huge TV — without you keeping a closet full of every size.
text.zh: 你只交出一件衣服（原始圖片），裁縫師會在客人上門的當下，立刻改成最合身的尺寸——手機、筆電、還是大電視都行。你不必準備一整櫃各種尺寸的版本。

text.en: Handling images yourself is surprisingly painful: you need different sizes for phones and desktops, modern formats for speed, a place to store everything, and a fast way to deliver it. Images bundles all of that into one product.
text.zh: 自己處理圖片其實很麻煩：手機和桌機要不同尺寸、要用新格式才夠快、要找地方存放、還要能快速傳送。Images 把這些麻煩全部包成一個服務。

text.en: Stop exporting 5 sizes of every photo. Ask for any width in the URL and Images makes it on demand.
text.zh: 不用再為每張照片匯出 5 種尺寸。只要在網址裡指定寬度，Images 就即時幫你產生。

text.en: Smaller, modern formats (WebP/AVIF) mean less data to download and quicker load times.
text.zh: 更小、更新的格式（WebP／AVIF）代表下載資料更少、載入更快。

text.en: Upload originals to Cloudflare and let it host them — no separate bucket or server needed.
text.zh: 把原圖上傳到 Cloudflare 由它代管，不必再另外架儲存空間或伺服器。

text.en: Images ride Cloudflare's worldwide network, so visitors everywhere get them quickly.
text.zh: 圖片走 Cloudflare 的全球網路，世界各地的訪客都能快速取得。

text.en: Product photos in thumbnails, grids, and zoom views — all from one upload.
text.zh: 商品照要做縮圖、列表、放大檢視——一張原圖全包。

text.en: Serve crisp cover images that adapt to phones and widescreens automatically.
text.zh: 封面圖會自動適配手機與寬螢幕，永遠清晰。

text.en: Let users upload avatars or photos straight to Images with one-time direct upload URLs.
text.zh: 用一次性的「直接上傳網址」，讓使用者把頭像或照片直接上傳到 Images。

text.en: Any app that needs the same picture in many sizes across many devices.
text.zh: 任何需要同一張圖、在多種裝置上呈現多種尺寸的網站或 App。

text.en: There are two ways to use Images: (1) upload originals to Cloudflare and let it host them, or (2) keep images on your own site and transform them through a special URL. Below we do both.
text.zh: Images 有兩種用法：（1）把原圖上傳到 Cloudflare 由它代管；（2）圖片留在你自己的網站，透過一個特殊網址即時轉換。下面兩種都會示範。

text.en: In the Cloudflare dashboard, create an API token with the Images permission. Save your Account ID too. A token is like a password that lets your code talk to Cloudflare safely.
text.zh: 在 Cloudflare 控制台建立一個有 Images 權限的 API 權杖（token），並記下你的 Account ID。權杖就像一組密碼，讓你的程式可以安全地跟 Cloudflare 溝通。

text.en: Send the file to the Images API. The -F file=@ part attaches a local file. The response gives you an image id and ready-to-use delivery URLs (variants).
text.zh: 把檔案傳到 Images API。指令裡 -F file=@ 就是附上本機檔案。回應會給你一個 image id，以及可直接使用的傳送網址（也就是各個 variant）。

text.en: You get back the image id and a delivery URL. The word at the end (here 'public') is a variant — a named size/quality preset you configure in the dashboard.
text.zh: 你會拿到 image id 和一條傳送網址。網址結尾那個字（這裡是 public）就是 variant——一組你在控制台設定好的「尺寸／品質」預設組合。

text.en: Drop the delivery URL straight into an tag. That's it — Cloudflare serves the optimized image.
text.zh: 直接把傳送網址放進 標籤就好。完成——Cloudflare 會送出最佳化後的圖片。

title.en: Or transform on the fly via URL

text.en: If your image already lives on your own domain, add /cdn-cgi/image/<options>/ in front of it. Here we ask for 800px wide, 75% quality, and format=auto (Cloudflare picks WebP or AVIF if the browser supports it).
text.zh: 如果圖片本來就放在你自己的網域，只要在網址前面加上 /cdn-cgi/image/<選項>/。下面是指定寬 800px、品質 75%、format=auto（Cloudflare 會自動挑瀏覽器支援的 WebP 或 AVIF）。

text.en: A saved preset like 'thumbnail' (200px) or 'public' (full). You request a variant by name in the URL.
text.zh: 一組存好的預設，例如 thumbnail（200px）或 public（原尺寸）。你在網址裡用名字指定要哪個變體。

text.en: format=auto lets Cloudflare deliver AVIF or WebP — newer, smaller formats — when the browser supports them, otherwise JPEG/PNG.
text.zh: format=auto 讓 Cloudflare 在瀏覽器支援時送出 AVIF 或 WebP（更新、更小的格式），不支援就退回 JPEG／PNG。

text.en: Controls how the image fills the target box: scale-down, contain, cover, crop, or pad.
text.zh: 決定圖片如何填進指定框：scale-down、contain、cover、crop、pad 等。

text.en: CDN means Content Delivery Network — servers worldwide that cache and serve content from near each visitor.
text.zh: CDN 是「內容傳遞網路」：分布全球的伺服器，會就近快取並傳送內容給每位訪客。

text.en: A one-time URL you give end users so they upload straight to Images without exposing your API token.
text.zh: 一個發給終端使用者的一次性網址，讓他們直接把檔案上傳到 Images，又不必外洩你的 API 權杖。

text.en: Input: PNG, JPEG, GIF, WebP, SVG, AVIF, HEIC. Output: PNG, JPEG, GIF, WebP, AVIF.
text.zh: 可輸入：PNG、JPEG、GIF、WebP、SVG、AVIF、HEIC。可輸出：PNG、JPEG、GIF、WebP、AVIF。

text.en: Storing originals costs $5 per 100,000 images per month; delivering them costs $1 per 100,000 images per month. URL transformations give you 5,000 free unique transformations each month, then $0.50 per 1,000 after that.
text.zh: 儲存原圖每月每 10 萬張 5 美元；傳送每月每 10 萬張 1 美元。網址轉換每月有 5,000 次免費的「不重複轉換」，超過後每 1,000 次 0.5 美元。

text.en: Uploaded (hosted) images: up to 10 MB per file. Remote images you transform: up to 100 MB. Both cap at 100 megapixels of area and 12,000 px on any single side.
text.zh: 上傳（代管）的圖片：每張最大 10 MB。你拿來轉換的遠端圖片：最大 100 MB。兩者面積上限都是 1 億畫素（100 megapixels），單邊最長 12,000 px。

en: Use format=auto everywhere — it is the single biggest, easiest speed win.
Set a sensible max width; nobody needs a 6000px photo on a phone.
Animated GIF/WebP work too, but very large animations may skip transformation.
A 'unique transformation' is counted once per distinct set of options + source, then cached.
zh: 到處都加上 format=auto——這是最簡單又最有感的提速招數。
設定合理的最大寬度；手機根本不需要 6000px 的照片。
動態 GIF／WebP 也支援，但超大的動畫可能會略過轉換。
「不重複轉換」是依「選項組合＋來源圖」各算一次，之後會被快取重複使用。
